paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, representing a decrease of 3.95% from the prior close and 20.9% over the past 21 trading sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Draining the Ogallala Aquifer for AI? Project Matador and the myth of limitless growth" from Environment America and "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN, both of which discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt AI campus being built in the Texas Panhandle.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including the appointment of four new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings, with a total of 25 filings in the feed.
